expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Statuses",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task status tracking and filtering in the task list.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add task status storage with pending default",
      "description": "As a product team, I want each task to persist a status with a default of pending so that existing and new tasks have a consistent lifecycle state.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Tasks persist a status value in storage",
        "Existing tasks default to 'pending' after migration",
        "New tasks default to 'pending' when status is omitted",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/*task-status*",
        "src/models/task.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add backend task status update action",
      "description": "As a user, I want to update a task status from allowed values so that progress changes are saved reliably.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend accepts pending, in_progress, and done status values",
        "Invalid status values are rejected with a clear error",
        "Status update endpoint or action persists changes",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/services/tasks/updateTaskStatus.ts",
        "src/routes/tasks.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Show task status badge on task cards",
      "description": "As a user, I want task cards to display a status badge so that I can quickly scan task progress.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Each task card renders a badge that reflects current status",
        "Badge states cover pending, in progress, and done",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/tasks/TaskCard.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add status control in task list rows",
      "description": "As a user, I want to change status directly from the task list so that updates require minimal navigation.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task list row includes control to set pending, in progress, or done",
        "Changing control value triggers backend update and reflects saved status",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/tasks/TaskListRow.tsx",
        "src/components/tasks/StatusSelect.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Filter task list by status",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter tasks by status so that I can focus on a specific work state.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Filter options include All, Pending, In Progress, and Done",
        "Selecting a filter updates visible task rows accordingly",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/tasks/TaskFilters.tsx",
        "src/pages/TasksPage.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover schema, backend status updates, badge display, status controls, and filtering.
